issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing 'deckSize' parameter (should be 5). Filter uses 'ByName' but card effect specifies searching by type {Dressrosa}, not by name. Should use type-based filter. Missing explicit reveal mechanic and deck bottom placement logic.

PlayFromHand filter is incomplete. Missing 'maxCost' constraint (cost of 1). Filter should specify cost:1 as a constraint, not just maxCost. Effect says 'play up to 1' which requires proper quantity limiting.

DSL is missing critical sequence: (1) Look at top 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 Dressrosa Stage, (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order, (5) then play up to 1 Dressrosa Stage with cost 1. Current DSL collapses these into two actions without the intermediate deck manipulation step.
